STIPULATION AND MUTUAL WAIVER OF FINAL DECLARATION OF DISCLOSURE

BOTH PARTIES MUST SIGN AND DATE THE SECOND ADDENDUM. RESPONDENT'S SIGNATURE MUST BE NOTARIZED AS RESPONDENT IS IN DEFAULT.
